name: Data Collection to Removable Media
description: Detects bulk data copying to removable media devices
query:
// Detect data copying to removable drives
// Trigger on copy operations to removable media paths
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(copy|cp|xcopy|robocopy|rsync).*(E:\\|F:\\|/media/|/mnt/usb|/Volumes/)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 3
within 300 seconds
